'''âzh-n-h''' ('''kazhanah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knight|knight]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-n-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knight|knight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-n-h
|-
! Lemma
| kazhanah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhanah|thizhanah]] || [[word:jizhanah|jizhanah]] || [[word:shizhanah|shizhanah]] || [[word:kizhanah|kizhanah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhanah|thuthuzhanah]] || [[word:jujuzhanah|jujuzhanah]] || [[word:shushuzhanah|shushuzhanah]] || [[word:kukuzhanah|kukuzhanah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhanah|thuzhanah]] || [[word:juzhanah|juzhanah]] || [[word:shuzhanah|shuzhanah]] || [[word:kuzhanah|kuzhanah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhanah|thuzhanah]] || [[word:juzhanah|juzhanah]] || [[word:shuzhanah|shuzhanah]] || [[word:kuzhanah|kuzhanah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhanah|thezhanah]] || [[word:jezhanah|jezhanah]] || [[word:shezhanah|shezhanah]] || [[word:kezhanah|kezhanah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhanah|thothozhanah]] || [[word:jojozhanah|jojozhanah]] || [[word:shoshozhanah|shoshozhanah]] || [[word:kokozhanah|kokozhanah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhanah|thozhanah]] || [[word:jozhanah|jozhanah]] || [[word:shozhanah|shozhanah]] || [[word:kozhanah|kozhanah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhanah|thozhanah]] || [[word:jozhanah|jozhanah]] || [[word:shozhanah|shozhanah]] || [[word:kozhanah|kozhanah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhanah|thĂŠzhanah]] || [[word:jĂŠzhanah|jĂŠzhanah]] || [[word:shĂŠzhanah|shĂŠzhanah]] || [[word:kĂŠzhanah|kĂŠzhanah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhanah|thathazhanah]] || [[word:jajazhanah|jajazhanah]] || [[word:shashazhanah|shashazhanah]] || [[word:kakazhanah|kakazhanah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhanah|thazhanah]] || [[word:jazhanah|jazhanah]] || [[word:shazhanah|shazhanah]] || [[word:kazhanah|kazhanah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhanah|thazhanah]] || [[word:jazhanah|jazhanah]] || [[word:shazhanah|shazhanah]] || [[word:kazhanah|kazhanah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhanah|shazhanah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhanah|goshazhanah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhanah|gokishazhanah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhanahnĂŒ|shazhanahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhanahnknĂŒ|goshazhanahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhanahnĂŒ|gokishazhanahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhanahshĂ«|shazhanahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkshĂ«|goshazhanahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhanahshĂ«|gokishazhanahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhanahro|shazhanahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkro|goshazhanahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhanahro|gokishazhanahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhanahmu|shazhanahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkmu|goshazhanahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhanahmu|gokishazhanahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhanahsher|shazhanahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhanahnksher|goshazhanahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhanahsher|gokishazhanahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhanahng|shazhanahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkng|goshazhanahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhanahng|gokishazhanahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhanahya|shazhanahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkya|goshazhanahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhanahya|gokishazhanahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhanahyam|shazhanahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkyam|goshazhanahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhanahyam|gokishazhanahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhanahnĂŒshĂ«|shazhanahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhanahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhanahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhanahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhanahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhanahnĂŒro|shazhanahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhanahnknĂŒro|goshazhanahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhanahnĂŒro|gokishazhanahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhanahnĂŒmu|shazhanahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhanahnknĂŒmu|goshazhanahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhanahnĂŒmu|gokishazhanahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhanahshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhanahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhanahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhanahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhanahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhanahshĂ«ro|shazhanahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkshĂ«ro|goshazhanahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhanahshĂ«ro|gokishazhanahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhanahshĂ«mu|shazhanahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkshĂ«mu|goshazhanahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhanahshĂ«mu|gokishazhanahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhanahronĂŒ|shazhanahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkronĂŒ|goshazhanahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhanahronĂŒ|gokishazhanahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhanahroshĂ«|shazhanahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkroshĂ«|goshazhanahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhanahroshĂ«|gokishazhanahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhanahromu|shazhanahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkromu|goshazhanahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhanahromu|gokishazhanahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhanahmunĂŒ|shazhanahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkmunĂŒ|goshazhanahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhanahmunĂŒ|gokishazhanahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhanahmushĂ«|shazhanahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkmushĂ«|goshazhanahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhanahmushĂ«|gokishazhanahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhanahmuro|shazhanahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhanahnkmuro|goshazhanahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhanahmuro|gokishazhanahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
